history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands with arms crossed, head bowed, in a casual pose. They are wearing a light-colored t-shirt with a subtle graphic and light gray sweatpants. White sneakers with a black and gray design are on their feet. The setting appears to be a village or small town, with a cobblestone path and grass on either side. In the background, a two-story brick building with green shutters is visible, along with a wooden pole with a textured surface. Trees with green leaves frame the scene, and the sky is a soft blue with hints of clouds. The lighting is natural, suggesting it's late afternoon or early evening, creating a slightly muted and serene atmosphere. The overall color palette is dominated by greens, grays, and earthy tones, with a touch of warmth from the brick building. The mood is contemplative and peaceful.
